title: I’m done with Mullvad - moonwriting
excerpt: Dear reader, For a long time, Mullvad VPN stood as the embodiment of a perfect privacy-focused company. From innovative features and data minimization to...
content_html:
Dear reader,

For a long time, Mullvad VPN stood as the embodiment of a perfect privacy-focused company. From innovative features and data minimization to responsible marketing, Mullvad checked every box that mattered. It almost appeared that the company was immune to criticism.

The recent revelation that Mullvad’s other CEO Daniel Berntsson had donated 5 million SEK to an ethnonationalist Örebro Party shattered the image of a flawless company.

The donation had crossed the line of what many people are willing to tolerate. It felt infuriating knowing that a part of my subscription money had helped this political party to exist in its current form. This single donation accounted for 72% of the party’s income in 2025.

While personal matters should remain private, Berntsson’s donation is relevant since it funds politics that go against the whole ethos of Mullvad. On its website, Mullvad discusses its ideals of “a free and open society,” but that’s not what the Örebro Party wants. By embracing remigration, it wishes to build a society where anyone who doesn’t look like your stereotypical white Swedish person gets exported out of the country. To quote the party leader Markus Allard: "Sweden belongs to the Swedes. We have to make sure that we take care of our own damn people and we must deport these damn parasites who sit and live at our expense."

Mullvad has failed to understand how problematic the donation is, which became apparent from the statement it has been pushing on social media.

Mullvad is a political company fighting for free speech, free information and privacy, with two equal co-founders, co-owners and co-CEOs who fundamentally disagree on many issues. Daniel's donation to a political party is private and not part of Mullvad's mission. We protect the right to express and access views we disagree with. We welcome anyone sharing these core values, whatever their other opinions. We are happy to refund others who don't, where we can.

What’s noteworthy about the message is that Mullvad presents itself as a company involved in politics, which is a reality people don’t always understand or want to accept.

The decision to give a refund to anyone who wants it is also the right thing to do, but it does contradict Mullvad’s normal policy regarding refunds. Nevertheless, I received my money from the remaining time, even though I had paid with Monero.

I’m less thrilled about how Mullvad portrays Berntsson’s donation as free speech that has nothing to do with Mullvad. As if it isn’t a problem that their CEO is supporting policies that go against everything that Mullvad stands for as a company. I don’t see how Berntsson can stay as the co-CEO of Mullvad.

I’m not the only one who has been disappointed. Pushback from the users has been vigorous, and some of Mullvad’s employees are considering leaving the company. I cannot blame them.

Responding to criticism

Critics have accused people of overreacting and argued that this incident doesn’t matter. I will now go through these arguments and offer my response.

It was a personal donation; it’s irrelevant to Mullvad and doesn’t affect the product

Of course it matters. It’s the same problem if the CEO of a solar energy company donated money to a political party promoting the use of fossil fuels.

While the consequences for the product may not be in sight, it is likely that Mullvad loses talented people because of this. The damage to its reputation can also affect its partnerships.

People should understand that there are more ways to evaluate products than staring at technical specs and ignoring everything else.

If we react each time a company or its CEO does something stupid, we will run out of companies to choose from

It isn’t always possible or practical to jump ship after every controversy, but we can still voice our disapproval. In this case, the switch is simple: Mullvad isn’t the only privacy-respecting VPN provider on the market, and not all VPN CEOs are donating money to harmful causes.

You’re just virtue signaling

Believe it or not but people can stand behind their moral values without ulterior motives.

Switching VPN providers

Since I was already familiar with the VPN landscape, I only had a few options to consider.

Proton VPN

I was reluctant to increase my reliance on Proton, as I have discussed in my recent article.

I’m neither a fan of its pricing, where you’re almost forced to commit to the multi-year deal as the monthly plan is so expensive. It’s interesting how Proton’s VPN service is the biggest culprit of this practice when compared to its other products.

I also feel that in recent years, Proton VPN hasn’t improved much on the privacy front. The larger server network and streaming support are nice to have, but they shouldn’t be Proton’s main focus. The macOS kill switch issue is something I cannot ignore, and it’s one of the biggest reasons I ruled out Proton.

Windscribe

Windscribe is a VPN service that many recommend in privacy circles, but the more I looked at it, the less impressed I was. You can have many opinions about the provocative marketing that leans to the SEO territory, but when a company goes to social media to insult other people, I’m left wondering what’s wrong with the people there.

It also had a severe security-related incident in 2021 when it came to light that Windscribe hadn’t encrypted its Ukrainian servers. While it was transparent about the issue and has improved its security since, other privacy-focused providers haven’t made similar blunders.

The final nail in the coffin was Windscribe’s decision to start writing blog posts with AI. In a world full of AI-generated content, I certainly don’t need more of that from a VPN company. In the end, Windscribe wasn’t a company I wanted to support.

IVPN

After investigating and considering my needs, I settled on IVPN, which has an excellent reputation and reminds me of Mullvad. Its strong ethics have always impressed me, and it was about time I rewarded that. The experience has been great.

The lack of split tunneling on macOS seemed like a deal-breaker, but after thinking about it, I realized I haven’t used the feature in months, even when it was available on Mullvad.

VPN blocking issues are still common, but it’s an issue that haunts every VPN provider and varies between servers.

While I still consider Mullvad the market leader regarding innovative privacy features, IVPN nails the most critical feature: trust. Because of this, IVPN has taken the top spot on my list of privacy-focused VPN providers.

Is there a way out for Mullvad?

There is a way for Mullvad to get itself out of this mess and regain people’s trust. It needs to get rid of Berntsson. I’m willing to consider returning in the future if this happens, but I’m not holding my breath. 🌔

sentences.zh: 我也觉得近年来Proton VPN在隐私方面并没有太大的进步。

sentences.en: The larger server network and streaming support are nice to have, but they shouldn’t be Proton’s main focus.
sentences.zh: 更大的服务器网络和流媒体支持固然很好，但它们不应该成为 Proton 的主要关注点。

sentences.en: The macOS kill switch issue is something I cannot ignore, and it’s one of the biggest reasons I ruled out Proton.
sentences.zh: macOS 的终止开关问题是我无法忽视的问题，也是我排除 Proton 的最大原因之一。

blocks.html_en: Windscribe

sentences.en: Windscribe
sentences.zh: 爬墙

blocks.html_en: Windscribe is a VPN service that many recommend in privacy circles, but the more I looked at it, the less impressed I was. You can have many opinions about the provocative marketing that leans to the SEO territory, but when a company goes to social media to insult other people, I’m left wondering what’s wrong with the people there.

sentences.en: Windscribe is a VPN service that many recommend in privacy circles, but the more I looked at it, the less impressed I was.
sentences.zh: Windscribe是隐私圈里很多人推荐的VPN服务，但我越看越没有印象。

sentences.en: You can have many opinions about the provocative marketing that leans to the SEO territory, but when a company goes to social media to insult other people, I’m left wondering what’s wrong with the people there.
sentences.zh: 你可以对 SEO 领域的挑衅性营销有很多看法，但当一家公司在社交媒体上侮辱其他人时，我很想知道那里的人出了什么问题。

blocks.html_en: It also had a severe security-related incident in 2021 when it came to light that Windscribe hadn’t encrypted its Ukrainian servers. While it was transparent about the issue and has improved its security since, other privacy-focused providers haven’t made similar blunders.

sentences.en: It also had a severe security-related incident in 2021 when it came to light that Windscribe hadn’t encrypted its Ukrainian servers.
sentences.zh: 2021 年，该公司还发生了一起严重的安全相关事件，当时 Windscribe 并未对其乌克兰服务器进行加密。

sentences.en: While it was transparent about the issue and has improved its security since, other privacy-focused providers haven’t made similar blunders.
sentences.zh: 虽然它对这个问题是透明的，并且自那以后提高了安全性，但其他注重隐私的提供商并没有犯类似的错误。

blocks.html_en: The final nail in the coffin was Windscribe’s decision to start writing blog posts with AI. In a world full of AI-generated content, I certainly don’t need more of that from a VPN company. In the end, Windscribe wasn’t a company I wanted to support.

sentences.en: The final nail in the coffin was Windscribe’s decision to start writing blog posts with AI.
sentences.zh: 棺材上的最后一颗钉子是 Windscribe 决定开始使用人工智能撰写博客文章。

sentences.en: In a world full of AI-generated content, I certainly don’t need more of that from a VPN company.
sentences.zh: 在一个充满人工智能生成内容的世界中，我当然不需要 VPN 公司提供更多此类内容。

sentences.en: In the end, Windscribe wasn’t a company I wanted to support.
sentences.zh: 最终，Windscribe 并不是我想要支持的公司。

blocks.html_en: IVPN

After investigating and considering my needs, I settled on IVPN, which has an excellent reputation and reminds me of Mullvad. Its strong ethics have always impressed me, and it was about time I rewarded that. The experience has been great.

sentences.en: After investigating and considering my needs, I settled on IVPN, which has an excellent reputation and reminds me of Mullvad.
sentences.zh: 经过调查和考虑我的需求后，我选择了 IVPN，它的声誉很好，让我想起了 Mulvad。

sentences.en: Its strong ethics have always impressed me, and it was about time I rewarded that.
sentences.zh: 它强烈的道德观一直给我留下了深刻的印象，现在是我奖励这一点的时候了。

sentences.en: The experience has been great.
sentences.zh: 体验很棒。

blocks.html_en: The lack of split tunneling on macOS seemed like a deal-breaker, but after thinking about it, I realized I haven’t used the feature in months, even when it was available on Mullvad.

sentences.en: The lack of split tunneling on macOS seemed like a deal-breaker, but after thinking about it, I realized I haven’t used the feature in months, even when it was available on Mullvad.
sentences.zh: macOS 上缺乏分割隧道似乎是一个大问题，但经过思考，我意识到我已经好几个月没有使用该功能了，即使它在 Mulvad 上可用。

blocks.html_en: VPN blocking issues are still common, but it’s an issue that haunts every VPN provider and varies between servers.

sentences.en: VPN blocking issues are still common, but it’s an issue that haunts every VPN provider and varies between servers.
sentences.zh: VPN 阻止问题仍然很常见，但这个问题困扰着每个 VPN 提供商，并且在服务器之间有所不同。

blocks.html_en: While I still consider Mullvad the market leader regarding innovative privacy features, IVPN nails the most critical feature: trust. Because of this, IVPN has taken the top spot on my list of privacy-focused VPN providers.

sentences.en: While I still consider Mullvad the market leader regarding innovative privacy features, IVPN nails the most critical feature: trust.
sentences.zh: 虽然我仍然认为 Mulvad 是创新隐私功能的市场领导者，但 IVPN 抓住了最关键的功能：信任。

sentences.en: Because of this, IVPN has taken the top spot on my list of privacy-focused VPN providers.
sentences.zh: 正因为如此，IVPN 在我的注重隐私的 VPN 提供商列表中名列前茅。

blocks.html_en: Is there a way out for Mullvad?

sentences.en: Is there a way out for Mullvad?
sentences.zh: 穆尔瓦德还有出路吗？

blocks.html_en: There is a way for Mullvad to get itself out of this mess and regain people’s trust. It needs to get rid of Berntsson. I’m willing to consider returning in the future if this happens, but I’m not holding my breath. 🌔

sentences.en: There is a way for Mullvad to get itself out of this mess and regain people’s trust.
sentences.zh: Mulvad 有办法摆脱困境并重新获得人们的信任。

sentences.en: It needs to get rid of Berntsson.
sentences.zh: 它需要摆脱伯恩特森。

sentences.en: I’m willing to consider returning in the future if this happens, but I’m not holding my breath. 🌔
sentences.zh: 如果发生这种情况，我愿意考虑将来再回来，但我不会屏住呼吸。 🌔

content_html_zh:
亲爱的读者，

长期以来，Mullvad VPN 一直是一家注重隐私的完美公司的化身。 从创新功能和数据最小化到负责任的营销，穆尔瓦德检查了每一个重要的方框。 看起来该公司几乎没有受到批评。

最近，穆尔瓦德的另一位首席执行官 Daniel Berntsson 向民族主义厄勒布鲁党捐赠 500 万瑞典克朗的消息曝光，这打破了一家完美公司的形象。

这笔捐款已经超出了许多人的承受范围。 当我知道我的一部分捐款帮助这个政党以目前的形式存在时，我感到很愤怒。 这笔捐款占该党2025年收入的72%。

虽然个人事务应该保密，但伯恩特松的捐赠具有重要意义，因为它资助了违背穆尔瓦德整体精神的政治。 穆尔瓦德在其网站上讨论了其“自由开放社会”的理想，但这并不是厄勒布鲁党想要的。 通过拥抱移民，它希望建立一个社会，任何看起来不像典型的瑞典白人的人都可以被输出到国外。 引用该党领导人马库斯·阿拉德的话说：“瑞典属于瑞典人。 我们必须确保照顾好我们自己该死的人民，我们必须驱逐这些以我们为代价生存的该死的寄生虫。”

穆尔瓦德未能理解这笔捐款的问题有多大，这一点从其在社交媒体上发布的声明中可以明显看出。

Mulvad 是一家争取言论自由、信息自由和隐私的政治公司，其两位平等的联合创始人、共同所有者和联合首席执行官在许多问题上存在根本分歧。 丹尼尔向政党的捐款是私人的，不属于穆尔瓦德使命的一部分。 我们保护表达和获取我们不同意的观点的权利。 我们欢迎任何分享这些核心价值观的人，无论他们有什么其他意见。 我们很乐意尽可能为那些没有退款的人退款。

该信息值得注意的是，Mullvad 将自己描述为一家参与政治的公司，这是人们并不总是理解或愿意接受的现实。

向任何想要退款的人提供退款的决定也是正确的做法，但这确实违反了 Mulvad 关于退款的正常政策。 尽管如此，尽管我已经用门罗币付款，但我还是从剩余时间收到了钱。

我对穆尔瓦德如何将伯恩特森的捐赠描述为与穆尔瓦德无关的言论自由感到不那么兴奋。 他们的首席执行官支持违背 Mulvad 作为一家公司所代表的一切的政策，这似乎不是问题。 我不知道 Berntsson 如何能够继续担任 Mulvad 的联席首席执行官。

我不是唯一一个感到失望的人。 用户的强烈反对，穆尔瓦德的一些员工正在考虑离开公司。 我不能责怪他们。

回应批评

批评者指责人们反应过度，并认为这一事件无关紧要。 现在我将回顾这些论点并给出我的回应。

这是个人捐赠；与 Mulvad 无关，不影响产品

当然这很重要。 如果一家太阳能公司的首席执行官向提倡使用化石燃料的政党捐款，也会出现同样的问题。

虽然该产品的后果可能还看不到，但 Mulvad 很可能因此而失去人才。 其声誉受损也会影响其合作伙伴关系。

人们应该明白，评估产品的方法有很多，而不是只盯着技术规格而忽略其他一切。

如果我们每次一家公司或其首席执行官做了愚蠢的事情时都做出反应，我们将没有公司可供选择

在每次争议后跳槽并不总是可能或不切实际的，但我们仍然可以表达我们的反对。 在这种情况下，转变很简单：Mullvad 不是市场上唯一尊重隐私的 VPN 提供商，也不是所有 VPN 首席执行官都向有害事业捐款。

你只是美德信号

不管你信不信，但人们可以在没有别有用心的情况下坚持自己的道德价值观。

切换 VPN 提供商

由于我已经熟悉 VPN 环境，因此我只需考虑几个选项。

质子VPN

正如我在最近的文章中所讨论的那样，我不愿意增加对 Proton 的依赖。

我也不喜欢它的定价，因为月度计划非常昂贵，你几乎被迫承诺多年协议。 有趣的是，与其他产品相比，Proton 的 VPN 服务是这种做法的最大罪魁祸首。

我也觉得近年来Proton VPN在隐私方面并没有太大的进步。 更大的服务器网络和流媒体支持固然很好，但它们不应该成为 Proton 的主要关注点。 macOS 的终止开关问题是我无法忽视的问题，也是我排除 Proton 的最大原因之一。

爬墙

Windscribe是隐私圈里很多人推荐的VPN服务，但我越看越没有印象。 你可以对 SEO 领域的挑衅性营销有很多看法，但当一家公司在社交媒体上侮辱其他人时，我很想知道那里的人出了什么问题。

2021 年，该公司还发生了一起严重的安全相关事件，当时 Windscribe 并未对其乌克兰服务器进行加密。 虽然它对这个问题是透明的，并且自那以后提高了安全性，但其他注重隐私的提供商并没有犯类似的错误。

棺材上的最后一颗钉子是 Windscribe 决定开始使用人工智能撰写博客文章。 在一个充满人工智能生成内容的世界中，我当然不需要 VPN 公司提供更多此类内容。 最终，Windscribe 并不是我想要支持的公司。

IVPN

经过调查和考虑我的需求后，我选择了 IVPN，它的声誉很好，让我想起了 Mulvad。 它强烈的道德观一直给我留下了深刻的印象，现在是我奖励这一点的时候了。 体验很棒。

macOS 上缺乏分割隧道似乎是一个大问题，但经过思考，我意识到我已经好几个月没有使用该功能了，即使它在 Mulvad 上可用。

VPN 阻止问题仍然很常见，但这个问题困扰着每个 VPN 提供商，并且在服务器之间有所不同。

虽然我仍然认为 Mulvad 是创新隐私功能的市场领导者，但 IVPN 抓住了最关键的功能：信任。 正因为如此，IVPN 在我的注重隐私的 VPN 提供商列表中名列前茅。

穆尔瓦德还有出路吗？

Mulvad 有办法摆脱困境并重新获得人们的信任。 它需要摆脱伯恩特森。 如果发生这种情况，我愿意考虑将来再回来，但我不会屏住呼吸。 🌔
